name: 86 Chaos 16 Low-Cost Presence + Request-Off Warning
label: 16.0.0 Low-Cost Presence + Request-Off Timestamps
notes: Bumped version to 16.0.0 for record keeping.
Added low-cost Realtime Database presence session handling and RTDB-backed System Admin presence snapshots.
Reduced presence writes by avoiding tab-change rewrites and avoiding constant Firestore heartbeat/listener usage.
Request Off calendar now warns when a selected date has already been requested by other people and shows the prior request count.
